name: Summarize and categorize news articles
prompt: Read stories.json containing 5 news articles. Create a news digest in digest.json with: (1) article_count: number of articles, (2) date_range: object with 'earliest' and 'latest' dates in YYYY-MM-DD format, (3) summaries: array of objects with 'title', 'source', 'one_line_summary' (max 20 words), and 'topic' (one of: 'Energy', 'Technology', 'Transportation', 'Business'), (4) key_numbers: array of notable statistics/numbers mentioned across all articles as objects with 'value' (string) and 'context' (string describing what the number refers to), extract at least 8 key numbers, (5) top_story: title of the most significant story (use editorial judgment).

criteria.testPattern: 5 summaries|each has required fields|topics valid|one_line under 20
at least 8|has fusion number|has chip number|has waymo number|has battery number

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
